task_completion.description: Modify the custom-config.js file to enforce the silent join policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js being edited to include 'startWithAudioMuted: true', 'startWithVideoMuted: true', and 'prejoinConfig: { enabled: false }' (or similar syntax setting enabled to false).

task_completion.description: Restart the Jitsi Meet services in the /home/ga/jitsi directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of 'docker compose restart', 'docker-compose restart', or a down/up sequence within the /home/ga/jitsi directory, along with the corresponding Docker output.

task_completion.description: Join a test meeting named 'silent-join-test' to verify the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to the Jitsi Meet instance with the URL ending in '/silent-join-test' or the meeting interface clearly displaying the meeting name 'silent-join-test'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the user joins directly with audio and video muted (pre-join screen disabled).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet meeting interface showing the user directly in the meeting (no pre-join screen prompting for name/devices) with both the microphone and camera icons clearly showing a muted state (e.g., crossed out or red).

task_completion.description: Create a verification file stating the policy is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the creation of the file /home/ga/silent_join_result.txt containing text that confirms the silent join policy is active.

integrity.description: The agent must use a real web browser to verify the meeting, not just curl or assume success.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show a graphical web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) rendering the Jitsi Meet UI, rather than just terminal commands fetching web pages.

integrity.description: The agent must actually restart the Docker containers, not just print a fake success message.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output should show standard Docker Compose logs/status messages indicating containers are stopping and starting (e.g., 'Restarting...', 'Started', 'Container jitsi-web-1').

integrity.description: The agent should create the verification file based on actual observation of the test meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The creation of /home/ga/silent_join_result.txt should occur after or alongside the browser screenshots showing the successful test, proving the agent didn't just skip the verification step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Config file path: /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js. Required settings to add/modify: 'startWithAudioMuted: true', 'startWithVideoMuted: true', and 'prejoinConfig' with 'enabled: false'. Result file path: /home/ga/silent_join_result.txt.
